Result: 10
Opaque predicate: 20
Instruction substitution: 225
String encryption: 128
Tail call optimized: 500500
Non tail call: 5050
Vectorized loop: 72
LTO: 20
Division by zero: 1
Null pointer deref: 41
Buffer overflow: 30
Integer overflow: 2000000000
